changes: Harden export/import and thumbnails after a code review: corrupt or incomplete import zips now show an error instead of breaking the System page, import failures (e.g. conflicting data) flash a message instead of a 500 and leave the database unchanged, importing is blocked while an export is building, huge-pixel cover images no longer break book saves or the thumbnail backfill, direct cover uploads are capped at 10MB again, orphaned export temp files are cleaned up at startup, and exports now fail loudly at startup if a new table is missing from the export list

Serve resized cover thumbnails (max 400px wide) on all list and grid pages instead of full-size images — the book detail page lightbox still shows the original. Thumbnails are generated on upload, backfilled in the background at startup, and regenerated after an import. Adds Pillow as a dependency.

Build library exports in the background — the Export Library button now shows a live progress bar while the zip is assembled (helpful on slower hosts), then presents a Download Export button; the built zip is kept for re-download until the next export or app restart

Add full-library export and import to the System page — export downloads a zip of all data (as JSON) plus cover images; importing a zip replaces the instance's data after an explicit confirmation step, backing up the current database to books_pre_import.db first

Fix the author/series suggestion chips on the book form rendering as full-width rows — the author scan review styles (v1.0.54) reused the same CSS class name; the System page rows are now .author-scan-suggestion

Add a book options menu (…) next to the title on the book details page — find the book on Amazon, Goodreads, StoryGraph, or Kobo (linking directly when the book has a stored URL), plus Edit and Delete
Add a Notes field to authors — free-text notes shown on the author page and edited on the author form
Add a 'Male and Female' gender option for two people writing under one pen name
Add an 'Unknown Gender' filter to the Authors page showing authors with no gender set or gender set to Unknown — works alongside search, pagination, and per-page

Fix the author scan's 'Review suggestions' button doing nothing when clicked from the System page — it now loads the review section in place via htmx instead of a same-page anchor link that never triggered a reload
Harden the author scan worker so an unexpected error can't leave the progress display stuck on 'running' forever — it now logs the error to the scan log and stops cleanly

Add Author Gender & Pronoun Scanner to the System page: looks up authors missing gender or pronouns using their Goodreads bio, Wikidata/Wikipedia, and website, counting the pronouns actually used in third-person prose (never guessing from names)
Scan findings appear as suggestions with an evidence quote and source link — accept or reject each one (or Accept All); nothing is written to an author without review
Scan pre-pass syncs gender/pronouns between alias and primary author records automatically
Add a 'Look up gender & pronouns' button to the author form that does the same lookup live and pre-fills the fields with the evidence shown
Fix Amazon cover images being lost during import when the page provides a plain image URL (operator-precedence bug)
Fix Pushover test button reporting success when the API rejected the notification — the API response is now checked
Fix a single failing price watch aborting the daily check for all remaining watches; errors are recorded per watch instead
Fix the price watch scheduler running twice (duplicate checks/notifications) under the Flask debug server
Fix deleting a book leaving a blank ghost entry in the reading queue
Fix 'add to top' of the reading queue assigning duplicate positions once an item reached position 0
Fix starting a genre/series scan while another was paused running two scans at once
Validate that a read's finish date is not before its start date, and that a book has a format, with friendly errors instead of crashes
Harden cover image URL downloads: redirects are re-validated against private/internal addresses and downloads are capped at 10MB
Use local time consistently for date added / created timestamps (was a mix of UTC and local, causing off-by-one-day displays)
Fix quick-add and duplicate checks treating % and _ in names as wildcards, which could match the wrong author/series/tag
Internal: all routes now use blueprint-qualified endpoints; removed the bare-endpoint aliasing shim
Add a 'Send Test Notification' button to the System page when Pushover credentials are configured
Add Kindle Price Watch: track Amazon Kindle book prices and get a Pushover notification when the price drops
New 'Price Watch' page in the sidebar nav for adding/removing watched books and checking prices on demand

Replace the book form's author and series pickers with a live search dropdown instead of a browser datalist, which iOS Safari doesn't support reliably — fixes author/series search not working when editing books on mobile
Fix author search slowness introduced by the new author.alias_of_id index — it had poor selectivity and made SQLite pick a worse query plan; replaced it with an index on author.name instead
Add database indexes on frequently filtered/joined columns (read.book_id, read.status, book.series_id, book.format_id, book.parent_id, book.date_added, author.alias_of_id, reading_queue.book_id)
Fix N+1 queries on the queue, series list, author detail, series detail, book list, and bundle child search pages
Batch the queue reorder update instead of fetching each item individually
Rewrite the Dashboard's Recently Read query to use a bounded aggregate instead of scanning the full reading history
Fix Amazon import failing on some product pages due to a header that was tripping Amazon's bot detection
Add 'Recently Read' section to the Dashboard, below Recently Added
Remove dead code: unused author/series search routes and templates, an orphaned description-scraper route, an unwired bundle quick-add route, and leftover CSS from earlier nav and picker designs
Auto-select Kindle format when importing a book from an Amazon Kindle URL
Add Amazon URL field to books, auto-populated on import alongside Goodreads URL
Automatically strip tracking/search cruft from Goodreads, Amazon, and StoryGraph URLs when saved
Add cache-busting version query to style.css so CSS updates aren't served stale from browser cache
Fix queue split button width not matching other buttons on mobile-width book detail page
Add Goodreads URL field to books
Add '...' menu on book detail tags to fetch missing tags from Goodreads
Fix queue Move dropdown clipping off right edge of viewport
Series update count now checks both Goodreads and Amazon and uses the higher value
Add Move dropdown to queue items for quickly repositioning to First, Previous, Next, or Last
Add 'at top' option to queue button on book detail page via split dropdown
Search results now include books by matching authors in the Books section
Improve Recommendations page load time by batching per-series queries
Allow browser caching of cover images and other static assets, fixing images visibly reloading on every page view
Fix XSS vulnerabilities in tag/author/series/bundle-child pickers and series name check
Add Discounts by Format per Year chart to Statistics page showing Kindle and Kobo discounts
Add book format tag to each reading queue item, displayed inline with the title
Add Spending by Format per Year stacked bar chart to Statistics page
Add Spending by Format summary table with per-year columns and totals
Table scrolls horizontally with the Format column pinned to the left
Add Average Book Cost and Median Book Cost to the Statistics summary
Fix statistics summary stat values being clipped or wrapping on wider number values
Fix content area width jumping on page load when sidebar is collapsed
Fix sidebar flash of expanded state on page load when sidebar is collapsed
Add icon and styled heading to each page header, matching the active sidebar navigation item
Page heading text and icon now use the sidebar active colour
Fix sidebar active link highlighting not working on any page
Replace top navigation bar with a collapsible sidebar — collapses to icon-only mode on desktop, slides in via hamburger on mobile
Sidebar state (collapsed/expanded) persisted in localStorage
Active navigation item highlighted in sidebar
Dark mode toggle moved to sidebar footer
Fix hamburger icon line colour not visible in light mode
Add Books Read per Year bar chart to the Statistics page
Change 'Books Added per Year' statistics chart to 'Books Purchased per Year' using the purchase date
Fix oversized cover image on book detail page on mobile
Fix book detail page cover image being too large on mobile — now shows as a compact side-by-side layout
Fix Escape key on System page tag search not clearing results
Replace deprecated Model.query.get() and get_or_404() with db.session.get() and db.get_or_404()
Pin exact dependency versions in requirements.txt
Harden series quick-add to return JSON instead of executable script tags
Use html.escape() in bundle child search to prevent XSS in generated markup
Optimise active_read property to skip a database query when reads are already loaded
Rewrite database migrations with schema version tracking so each migration only runs once
Replace Python-side series completion filtering with correlated SQL subqueries
Remove redundant local sqlalchemy imports shadowing module-level imports
Fix thread-safety: added locks around all scan dict mutations in background threads and route handlers
Fix SSRF: cover image URLs are now validated to block private, loopback, and non-http/https targets
Warn at startup when SECRET_KEY env var is not set
Update CLAUDE.md rating spec to match current 1-5 emoji tier implementation
Fix Goodreads book search to use title only — including author name caused zero results
Verify author name against each Goodreads search result to avoid accepting wrong books with the same title
Update Goodreads description selectors to match current page layout
Search now tries Goodreads first and falls back to Amazon (Amazon is frequently bot-blocked)
Replace separate Amazon and Goodreads fetch buttons with a single Fetch Description button
Fix queue button alignment on Recommendations page cards — buttons now sit consistently at the bottom of each card
Footer now shows the app version and a link to the changelog on the System page
Auto-focus the search field on the Search, Authors, and Series pages
Cursor placed at end of pre-filled search text after page load
Pressing Escape in a search field clears the text, resets results, and keeps the field focused
Collapse secondary nav items (Recommendations, Authors, Series, Statistics, System) into a More dropdown on desktop
Mobile nav continues to show all items as a flat list via the hamburger menu
Spending per Year chart now also shows Saved per Year as a grouped bar alongside Spent
Fix queue item titles and author names overflowing the screen on mobile instead of wrapping
Show a warning banner on book detail page when page count is missing
Fix queue button width on book detail page not matching Edit/Delete buttons on mobile
Fix drag-to-reorder ghost positioning on scrolled pages and mobile
Add reading queue: plan and reorder books to read next
Queue supports both library books and external entries (title, author, URL)
Touch-friendly drag-to-reorder on queue page using Pointer Events API (no external library)
Add to queue from Books list, Book detail, and Recommendations pages
Starting a read automatically removes the book from the queue
Auto-link prompt when a new library book matches an existing external queue entry
Replace numeric star rating with a 5-tier emoji system (🚫 Abandoned, ☹️ Didn't like, 😑 Ok, 🙂 Liked, 🤩 Really liked)
Migrate verbose book formats: 'Kindle eBook' → 'Kindle', 'Kobo eBook' → 'Kobo', 'Apple eBook' → 'Apple'
Child books now hide Date Purchased, Cost, Discounts, and Paid fields in the edit form
Bundle books derive their display rating from the average of rated child books when no explicit rating is set
Add changelog to the System page, populated from the full project history
Browser tab and toolbar now reflect the app’s primary colour via theme-color meta tags
Click any book cover to view it full-size in a lightbox overlay
Completed but unrated books now show an inline half-star rating widget on the detail page
Recommendations page now includes a Recent Additions section showing the 10 most recently added unread books
Fix bundle child book search: results were not appearing and clicking results did nothing
Fix Amazon series number extraction picking up the next-in-series value instead of the current book
Amazon import now parses series text (e.g. “Book 5 of 16: Series Name”) into series name and number separately
Bundle detail page hides the quick-add card once all expected child books are linked
Warn and prompt for confirmation when adding a series with a duplicate name
Bundle child books hide bundle-specific fields in their edit form
Bundle detail page now shows a quick-add card to link child books directly from the detail view
Read date inputs now warn if the year looks like a typo (before 1900 or more than 2 years in the future)
Bundle books are now shown as completed when all of their child books have been completed
Add explicit parent-child book relationships for bundles and omnibus editions
Child books show a corner overlay badge on book grid cards
Bundle edit page includes a searchable child-book picker
Add Bundles filter to the book list page
Alias author names now appear in the book form author autocomplete
Various UX improvements: series number label, form field ordering, and button styling
Fix apostrophe handling in series and author quick-add fields
Add Books Added per Year bar chart to the Statistics page
Add Most Read Authors (by distinct books) tables to the Statistics page with rank numbers
Fix internal server error and UndefinedError on the System page when a series scan is active or has just completed
Add Page Number distribution pie chart to Statistics with click-through filtering to the book list
Books on the author detail page are now sorted by series order
Add page-load progress bar at the top of the page
Add spending per year chart to Statistics
Fix progress bar persisting when using browser back/forward navigation
Fix Docker image size by excluding build artifacts
Pressing Enter in the import URL dialog now triggers the import
Improved Amazon description extraction with additional CSS selectors and a Goodreads fallback
Fix Total Saved stat to use cost minus paid rather than the discounts field
Add “Read” overlay badges to book grid cards across all pages
Fix book cover aspect ratio to reduce unwanted clipping
Add Recently Added section to the dashboard
Redesign Currently Reading section as a horizontal scroll card layout
Fix recommendations page layout with responsive book cover grid
Add dark mode toggle with localStorage persistence
Fix hamburger menu icon visibility in light mode
Add per-page selector to Series and Authors list pages
Add Complete filter to series list
Add series book count scanner to System page
Show read count and completion status on series detail page
Add No Links and Incomplete filters to series list page
Add Recommendations page with series continuations and random unread picks
Auto-focus the URL field when opening the import dialog
Add automated backup script with rolling daily/weekly/monthly retention
Add most-read books and authors sections to the Statistics page
Add mobile responsive layout with hamburger menu
Add Docker deployment with build and deploy scripts
Add quick-add buttons to import suggestions for authors and series
Add searchable datalist dropdowns for form fields
Add pagination to the authors list
Add lazy image loading throughout
Tune gunicorn configuration for SQLite workloads
Add statistics page with charts and summary metrics
Add percentage labels to pie and doughnut chart tooltips
Add total pages and series count to author detail page
Add Abandon button for active reads
Add System page with Goodreads genre scanner
Import genres as tags when importing a book from Goodreads
Add tag statistics chart
Add option to include tags in search results
Add tags for books, authors, and series
Add tag management utility to System page
Rearrange book detail page layout
Show author aliases prominently on author pages
Make editing forms more compact with side-by-side fields and collapsible sections
Format series numbers to hide trailing .0
Add automatic book description search from Amazon and Goodreads
Add Start Reading button to book detail page
Add read/unread filter to books list
Add configurable per-page dropdown to books list
Add series book count update via direct Goodreads/Amazon lookup
Add reading duration display to book detail page and dashboard
Add Mark Complete and Abandon buttons to dashboard active reads
Fix multi-author book import
Add book import from Amazon, Goodreads, and StoryGraph URLs
Add series search picker in book form
Add search functionality to series list
Improve series and authors list pages with grid layouts
Replace author multi-select with search-based tag picker
Migrate initial Notion book data
Dashboard improvements
Initial release: book, author, series, and read tracking with basic dashboard and search
